episodes.title: 'Annamalai Built a Cult Around Himself, Not the BJP': Sharp Attack Amid Rift Speculation
episodes.description:
Fresh criticism has emerged against K. Annamalai, with a political commentator claiming that his recent actions are driven by personal ambition rather than party interests.
The critic alleged that Annamalai cultivated a personality-driven following during his time in the BJP, arguing that such an approach clashes with the party's organizational culture and collective leadership model.
The remarks come amid intense speculation over Annamalai's future political moves and his relationship with the BJP leadership following his resignation as Tamil Nadu BJP chief.
